name: notebook
description: Ruled-paper notebook layout with red margin line, chapter tabs, and print-friendly white background. Each slide looks like a handwritten study page — ruled lines, arrow bullets, red accent, and a footer with page number and chapter tabs. Optimised for reference material, workshop handouts, and study guides that learners revisit after the session.

rendering.navigation: prev/next buttons + chapter tab bar (footer) + arrow keys
rendering.progress_indicator: page number (footer left) + chapter tabs (footer right)

content_rules.notes: Ruled lines fix line rhythm — keep bullet text to 1-2 lines each. Titles up to 30 chars (sits cleanly on one ruled line). Max 4 bullets; each bullet should be a self-contained study note. Chapter tabs auto-populate from divider slides — include at least one divider per chapter. Content is print-friendly: avoid dark backgrounds inside slide cards.

incompatible_styles.name: premium-dark
incompatible_styles.reason: premium-dark dark navy background conflicts with notebook's white ruled-paper card design.

incompatible_styles.name: visual-heavy
incompatible_styles.reason: visual-heavy full-bleed background image destroys the ruled-paper texture and margin line.

recommended_structure.notes: Divider slides auto-generate chapter tab labels. Cover uses centered layout with decorative rule. Summary slide uses contact/closing type.

author: co-deck
